Subject: Top Chef - Chef's Test
Description: Top Chef heads to Wisconsin with 15 new chefs, new rules and new host Kristen Kish. With no Quickfire Challenge this week, Kristen, Tom and Gail each task five chefs with cooking a dish they believe is a worthy test of being a good chef.

Subject: Top Chef - Living the High Life
Description: Top Chef Colorado winner Joe Flamm joins Kristen for the Quickfire Challenge, tasking the chefs to create a dish featuring hops.

Subject: Top Chef - Take It Cheesy
Description: The chefs must make a dish featuring Door County cherries and a mystery ingredient; for the Elimination Challenge, the chefs put on a Cheese Festival where each chef will be responsible for creating a dish featuring one of 13 different cheeses.

Subject: Top Chef - The Wright Way
Description: The chefs hit the road and take the Frank Lloyd Wright trail to Madison; for the elimination challenge, the chefs are tasked with creating dishes in teams of two that feature duality and celebrate Frank Lloyd Wright's legacy as ``America's Architect.``

Subject: Top Chef - Supper Club
Description: While in Madison, the chefs receive a message alerting them that they'll be shopping for their quickfire challenge, but they do not know what the challenge is.

Subject: Top Chef - Chaos Cuisine
Description: A Last Chance Kitchen surprise changes the game; Milk Bar's Christina Tosi joins Kristen for a sweet Quickfire that requires the chefs to create a dairy-forward dessert; the chefs must serve a dish that exemplifies chaos cuisine.

Subject: Top Chef - Sausage Race
Description: Bryan Voltaggio joins Kristen to test the chefs' flambé and charring skills; Amar Santana heads to the kitchen with the Milwaukee Brewers racing sausages; the chefs compete at the American Family Field and serve sausage-forward dishes.

Subject: Top Chef - Restaurant Wars
Description: Split into two teams, the chefs are tasked to conceptualize and create two restaurants that feature a three-course progressive menu with at least two options for each course.

Subject: Top Chef - The Good Land
Description: Kristen is joined by judges Tom and Gail for this week's Quickfire Challenge as the chefs are tasked to create dishes featuring cranberries in a unique way.

Subject: Top Chef - Lay It All on the Table
Description: A familiar face returns to the competition; Tom cooks up a dish that Kristen and Gail can't resist; the chefs must serve their creations directly on a tabletop to Kristen, Tom, Gail and guest judge Curtis Duffy.

Subject: Top Chef - Goodbye, Wisconsin
Description: The chefs are tasked with identifying as many ingredients as they can in a blind taste test; they must create a dish that exemplifies their culinary growth throughout their time in Wisconsin; returning guest judge Paul Bartolotta.

Subject: Top Chef - Set Sail
Description: The final four chefs must create a dish highlighting fish and cheese to impress Kristen, Tom, Gail and local guest judge Helmi Smeulders; the chefs then set sail on Holland America Line's Eurodam where they enjoy a meal prepared by chef Morimoto.

Subject: Top Chef - Cruising to a Win
Description: The three remaining chefs must create the best four-course progressive meal of their careers; the chefs will present their dishes to a lineup of culinary greats.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht - Tom Foolery
Description: Capt. Glenn is back on board Parsifal III, sailing the Balearic Island of Menorca with some familiar faces -- Daisy, Gary and Colin; new to the team, chef Marcos knows he has to make this season memorable for the guests.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht - Age-Old Problems
Description: Parsifal III's new crew figures out how to work together to execute a successful first charter; Marcos works tirelessly to satiate the massive appetites of the charter guests; Gabriela aims to prove she deserves the second stew title.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
Description: A hungover crew prepare for the second charter of the season; tensions come to a head when Gabriela and Ashley can't agree on who's in charge; the high demands of a group of returning charter guests leave chef Marcos and Daisy feeling lost at sea.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht - Oopsie Daisy
Description: Demanding charter guests continue to keep the crew on their toes; chef Marcos injures himself while trying to prepare the most bizarre dinner of his career; Capt. Glenn looks into the costly damage to the yacht.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht - Loose Lips Sink Ships
Description: While the sexual chemistry heats up on the boat, Ashley and Gabriela's tension continues; Marcos takes note of the competition unfolding between the junior stews and alerts Daisy; Tom gets some devastating news from home.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht - Yacht on the Rocks
Description: Parsifal III hits aground under Tom's watch, sending the boat into total chaos; the crew pulls it together for the guests' departure, but Tom's actions put Glenn and the deck team in a difficult situation.

Subject: Below Deck Sailing Yacht - Strip for the Tip
Description: Tom continues to spiral over his mistakes while juggling devastating news from back home; Capt. Glenn contemplates whether he can trust Tom; the Parsifal III crew pull together a talentless talent show for the energetic charter guests.

Subject: Orange County Choppers Original - Moving Over
Description: Orange County Choppers Original brings the legendary shop back to its roots -- real bikes, real stories, and the raw, unfiltered energy that made OCC a household name.

Subject: Sportsman's Adventures - Tampa Reds: Gulp! vs. Bait
Description: Capt. Rick Murphy fishes for redfish in Tampa Bay with Capt. Jeff Hagaman to see who can catch more using Gulp! shrimp or live bait.

Subject: Chasin' the Sun - Black Pearl's Final Resting Place

Subject: Moonshiners: Master Distiller - Jimmy Red Corn Reborn
Description: Three distillers compete to resurrect a Civil War-era shine made from Jimmy Red Corn, a rare variety once nearly extinct. Judged by Tim, Tickle, and guest expert Tim Jones, only one will master its flavor and earn a coveted spot on the shelf.

Subject: Expedition X - Welcome to the Real Derry
Description: Stephen King's ``IT`` features scary locations based on actual landmarks in Bangor, Maine; when Heather and Phil learn that many of those sites have real-life ghost stories of their own, they must investigate the locals' claims for themselves.

Subject: Expedition X - Haunted Savannah
Description: The team heads south to a haunted city: Savannah, Georgia; they investigate horrifying reports of violent paranormal activity inside one of its oldest buildings, the Sorrel-Weed House, where a family died in shocking circumstances.

Subject: Expedition X - City of Ghosts
Description: Heather and Phil continue their investigation of Savannah, Ga., America's haunted city; their quest takes them deep into the wilderness, where they discover a place of tragedy that many locals believe leads to powerful paranormal activity.

Subject: Expedition X - Descent Into the Mayan Underworld
Description: Phil and Heather descend deep into the Mayan underworld to explore a vast subterranean cave believed to be the realm of menacing and ancient spirits.

Subject: Expedition X - Spanish Zombies
Description: The team visits Galicia in search of the Santa Compaña -- an unholy horde of the undead terrorizing rural Spain. Their quest for these Spanish zombies leads them to a remote monastery in the countryside, rumored to be the site of dark rituals.

Subject: Expedition X - The Spanish Boogeyman
Description: Phil and Heather head to Belmonte Castle in La Mancha, Spain, said to be haunted by the Spanish Boogeyman. Inside the castle, they discover surprising secrets that reveal the truth behind the terrifying legend.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - The Man-Eating Lions of Kenya
Description: Josh braves the African savanna to investigate the rampage of two lions who killed as many as 135 railroad workers in 1898; to prevent more bloodshed, Josh joins wildlife rangers tracking a pair of rogue lions who are on a modern-day killing spree.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Searching For America's Lost Flight

Subject: Expedition Unknown - America's Lost WWII Hero

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Sunken Treasure of the Bahamas
Description: Josh helps recover the richest stash of lost treasure in the Americas; deploying cutting-edge technology and an armada of boats, the team dives the Caribbean to bring coins and jewels from the legendary Spanish galleon Maravillas to the surface.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Mysteries of Bermuda Triangle
Description: In the conclusion of his epic investigation, Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology to investigate the Triangle's most infamous shipwreck and lost flights; Expedition X probes America's most haunted lake and an extraterrestrial cult in Thailand.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Revealing the Triangle
Description: In the conclusion of his epic investigation, Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology to investigate the Triangle's most infamous shipwreck and lost flights.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Lost City of the White Jaguar
Description: Trekking deep into Mexico's narco-controlled jungles, Josh hunts for the last Mayan stronghold to ward off the Spanish conquistadors; he joins an expedition braving snakes, spiders and jaguars to uncover the legendary Sac Balam.

Subject: Expedition Unknown - Sunken Treasure of the Bahamas

Description: In the conclusion of his epic investigation, Josh Gates uses cutting-edge technology to investigate the Triangle's most infamous shipwreck and lost flights; Expedition X probes America's most haunted lake and an extraterrestrial cult in Thailand.

Subject: Mysteries of the Deep - Shipwreck Ghosts of Mexico
Description: Jeremy Wade explores the hidden and dark secrets behind a 150-year-old shipwreck off the coast of Sisal, Mexico, revealing an unknown and troubling maritime past. Also, a mysterious boiling river hidden deep in the heart of the Amazon is uncovered.

Subject: Deadliest Catch - No Turning Back
Description: A dangerous list forces Sig to jettison pots or capsize the Northwestern; one wrong move in the narrow False Pass causes Jake and the Saga to hit bottom; there's no accounting for taste when Sean Dwyer devises motivational punishments for greenhorns.

Subject: 120 Hours Behind Bars - Butler County Jail

Subject: Auction Kings - Napoleon Mirror/WWI Boy Scout Poster
Description: A hand mirror signed by Napoleon, and a World War I Boy Scouts war-bonds poster.

Subject: Operation Healing Heroes - Dave Bray
Description: U.S. Marine Corps veteran and musician Dave Bray USA tells of his time in service and how music continues to shape his and his family's lives.

Subject: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing - The Cudjoe Two-Step: Cudjoe, Lower Florida Keys
Description: George Poveromo splits his day between anchoring for yellowtails and trolling within Hawk Channel off Cudjoe in the lower Florida Keys.

Description: Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 crashes shortly after takeoff.

Subject: Air Disasters - Pacific Ditching
Description: Just after takeoff from Honolulu, TransAir Flight 810 loses power and ditches in the Pacific. Both pilots survive, blaming dual engine failure-but when the Boeing 737 is recovered, the wreckage reveals a different cause behind t.

Subject: Air Disasters - Pacific Ditching
Description: Just after takeoff from Honolulu, TransAir Flight 810 loses power and ditches in the Pacific. Both pilots survive, blaming dual engine failure-but when the Boeing 737 is recovered, the wreckage reveals a different cause behind t.

Subject: Air Disasters - Pacific Ditching
Description: Just after takeoff from Honolulu, TransAir Flight 810 loses power and ditches in the Pacific. Both pilots survive, blaming dual engine failure-but when the Boeing 737 is recovered, the wreckage reveals a different cause behind t.

Subject: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball - Episode 1 (1954-1957)
Description: When Indiana native Everett Case arrives in Raleigh to become the coach at North Carolina State, his vision spearheads not just the rise of college basketball at his school and in the region, but the start of a conference that will change the sport.

Subject: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball - Episode 2 (1958-1968)
Description: From Frank McGuire to Bones McKinney and Vic Bubas, new coaches emerge to challenge the early success of Everett Case. It all precedes a final poignant moment of triumph for Case at the only home the ACC Tournament has, until this point, ever known.

Subject: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball - Episode 3 (1966-1972)
Description: After a rough start, North Carolina's Dean Smith comes to be known for both dominance and dignity, playing a central role in desegregating the ACC with the recruitment of Charlie Scott, who emerges as a star on some of Smith's greatest teams.

Subject: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball - Episode 4 (1973-1974)
Description: An intense and high-impact rivalry develops between Maryland and North Carolina State, capped by the finale of the 1974 ACC Tournament in arguably the greatest college basketball game ever - and a battle that helps shape the future of the sport.

Subject: The Tournament: A History of ACC Men's Basketball - Episode 5 (1975-1980)
Description: Dean Smith's North Carolina teams may be the class of the ACC, but rivals also flourish, including a Virginia team led by Wally Walker, and a Duke program that re-emerges with a championship run in 1978 and a controversial title two years later.

Subject: College Basketball - North Carolina at Duke
Description: The No. 1 Blue Devils host the No. 17 Tar Heels at Cameron Indoor Stadium in Durham. Duke sits atop the ACC standings with North Carolina in fourth place. North Carolina won the first meeting of the season in a dramatic fashion defeating Duke 71-68.

Description: Featuring a group of young girls and a Heisman Trophy winner joining forces to ignite a flag football movement in Southern California.
